title: gaya gaudichaudiana var. genuina
intro: Gaya gaudichaudiana var. genuina, also known as the Yellow Cosmos or Yellow Sulfur Flower, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and a distinct scent. The medicinal properties of Gaya gaudichaudiana var. genuina include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat health problems such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Gaya gaudichaudiana var. genuina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin infections.
